capability_checks.description: Audit builds knowledge graph before any vulnerability analysis
capability_checks.expected_behavior: build-kg CLI command appears in transcript before any finding is reported

capability_checks.description: Each finding includes graph node IDs and code locations
capability_checks.expected_behavior: Every finding object has non-empty evidence_nodes[] and code_locations[]

capability_checks.description: Analysis references VulnDocs patterns for known vulnerability types
capability_checks.expected_behavior: At least one finding references a vulndoc pattern ID

evidence_requirements.description: BSKG node IDs referenced in findings
